title: Cactoid
description: Replacing some of cactuses to cactoid creatures
body:
🌵 This Resource Pack change the appearance some of the _cactuses_ turning them into **Cactoid** creatures!


![Cactoid](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6984bf13b345e36307501282ca1808c474b37c4c.png)

# 
**Changes:**
- 🎨 new variant of cactus texture
- ✨ blinking and mouth animations
# 
🏜️ **Cactoids** are rare creatures... they often inhabit deserts, you can find them with open mouth waiting for the prey... be careful cuz they also _can see you_
